title: Networking documentation mentioning localhost
description: Documentation about networking that discusses localhost and 127.0.0.1. Educational content should not trigger SSRF protection.

payload.response_body:
Loopback Interface

The loopback interface (127.0.0.1 or localhost) is used for internal communication. IPv6 uses ::1 as the loopback address. The link-local range 169.254.0.0/16 is used for APIPA when DHCP is unavailable.
